gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/447)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/447)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ صَلَّى صَلَاةَ جَعْفَرٍ كَتَبَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَهُ مِنِ الْأَجْرِ مِثْلَ مَا قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لِجَعْفَرٍ قَالَ إِي وَ اللَّهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Al-Hassan, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Al-Hakam Bin Miskeen, from Is’haq Bin Ammar who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘The one who prays a Salāt, the Salāt of Ja’faras, Allahazwj would Write for him, from the Recompense, the like of what Rasool-Allahsaww said to Ja’farasws?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes, by Allahazwj’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn al-Hassan has narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ali ibn Asbat from al-Hakam ibn Miskin from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘If one performs Salah (prayer) of Ja‘far, does Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, grant him a reward like that which the Messenger of Allah mentioned for Ja‘far?’ The Imam said, ‘Yes, by Allah, He does so.’”
